# RFP Platform — Feature SPEC standard

**Status:** Final · **Updated:** 2025-07-17

---

## 1. SPEC lifecycle

```
Identifier + Draft → Draft → Approved → Amended → Superseded
                                       ↓
                                   (never edited in place)
```

| Stage | Gate | Who |
|-------|------|-----|
| **Draft** | Scaffold approved | Agent |
| **Approved** | Owner reviews + confirms | Human |
| **Amended** | Post-Approval change | Agent (amendment sibling) |
| **Superseded** | Replaced by new SPEC | Agent |

**Rule:** Once a SPEC is **Approved**, do not edit it. Create an amendment sibling: `YYYYMMDD-SPEC-amendment-NN.md`.

---

## 2. File layout

```
.work/features/<bounded-context-slug>/
├── YYYYMMDD-SPEC.md
├── YYYYMMDD-SPEC-amendment-01.md
└── YYYYMMDD-SPEC-amendment-02.md
```

Slug matches the bounded context name from foundation doc 04 (e.g., `rag-engine`, `document-ingestion`).

---

## 3. SPEC template

```markdown
# SPEC: <Feature Name>

**Bounded context:** <BC# - Name>
**Status:** Draft | Approved | Amended | Superseded
**Updated:** YYYY-MM-DD
**ADR references:** ADR-###, ADR-###

---

## 1. Purpose
One paragraph — what this feature does and why it exists.

## 2. In scope
- Bullet list of what this SPEC covers

## 3. Out of scope (explicit)
- Bullet list of what is NOT covered (prevents scope creep)

## 4. Domain language
| Term | Definition |
|------|------------|
| | |

## 5. Behavioural rules (R1…)
Rules are numbered, testable, atomic.

- **R1:** …
- **R2:** …

## 6. Data model
Entities, fields, relationships relevant to this SPEC. Link to foundation doc 04 entities.

## 7. APIs
| Method | Path | Purpose | Auth |
|--------|------|---------|------|
| GET | /v1/… | … | … |

## 8. Invariants
Conditions that must always hold (data integrity, concurrency, ordering).

## 9. Error scenarios
| Condition | Error code | Behaviour |
|-----------|------------|-----------|
| | | |

## 10. Observability
Metrics, logs, traces relevant to this feature.

## 11. Security
Authz requirements, PII handling, tenant isolation.

## 12. i18n
Locale-specific behaviour (if any).

## 13. Test plan
- [ ] Unit tests for R1…Rn
- [ ] Integration test: …
- [ ] E2E: …

## 14. Open questions
| # | Question | Owner |
|---|----------|-------|
| | | |

## 15. Residual verification
Manual checks not covered by automated tests.
```

---

## 4. SPEC quality rules

| Rule | Description |
|------|-------------|
| Behavioural rules (R1…) | Every rule must be testable (unit, integration, or E2E) |
| Traceability | SPEC references ADRs; ADRs reference foundation scope |
| Open questions | Every TBD gets an entry in `UNKNOWNS.md` or SPEC §14 |
| No attribution | No "Generated by", "Created by", or agent signatures |
